sections.paragraph:
- Original: προσαναπληρόω

- Transliteration: Prosanapleroo

- Phonetic: pros-an-ap-lay-ro'-o

- Definition:

1. to fill up by adding to

- Origin: from G4314 and G378

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4314 and G378; to fill up further that is furnish fully: - supply.
